  --solution                Required. The solution to search in.

  --configuration           (Default: Debug) Project build configuration

  --framework               (Default: .) Regex used to match target frameworks.

  --exclude-assemblies      Comma separated list of assembly name patterns to
                            exclude.

  --include-assemblies      Comma separated list of assembly name patterns to
                            filter by.

  --outfile                 Required. Output file to output.

  --get-published-output    Get the published output of the tests rather than
                            the build output

  --skip-existence-check    Skips validation that the test assemblies we have
                            found exist on disk

  --file-mode               (Default: Overwrite) Indicates whether to append or
                            overwrite output file

  --framework-selector      (Default: All) Indicates how to determine the set of
                            target frameworks. Whether to pick All, the maximum
                            framework or the framework of top level application.

  --test-regex              (Default: (?i)test(s?)$) Regex for determining set
                            of test assemblies.

  -v, --verbosity           (Default: Information) Minimum Logging level
                            (Verbose,Debug,Information)

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.
